# Bug Report

Provide a clear and concise description of the issue.

```text
Example:
```

```text
Ubuntu

macOS
```

### Python Version

```text
Example:
Python 3.11
```

# Feature Request

If this issue is a feature request instead of a bug report, complete the following section.

---

## Feature Summary

Provide a concise description of the proposed feature.

---

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve?

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed implementation.

---

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternatives you have considered.

---

## Additional Notes

Add any supporting information, mockups, screenshots, or examples.

---

Thank you for helping improve ComfyFlow Insight.
